docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CORPORATION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CORPORATION SERVED AUG-05-1993, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ROSE

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CORPORATION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ROSE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CORPORATION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, ROSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 40 OSCEOLA LANE #5 94124, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CORPORATION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ROSE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION, DECLARATION, ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS & COMPLT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CORPORATION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CORPORATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ROSE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $2.23 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CORPORATION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, A DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ROSE
